name: Hudson Happy Vly Logistics
districts_or_customers: Local NEMT clients in Baldwin County / Milledgeville area; minority-owned, woman-owned small business (MBE/WOSB)
recent_news: Founded Sep 2018; registered as SAM entity for federal contracting opportunities; no school-bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit: appears to be a micro NEMT/medical-transport operator, not a school-bus contractor. No yellow-bus fleet, no district contracts evident. Pass.

name: Tasha Services
districts_or_customers: Operates as 'ART Transportation' (artransportation.net) serving disabled riders in Aventura / Miami-Dade area; no school district contracts identified.
recent_news: No M&A or news identified; small mailbox-style address (Biscayne Blvd Suite 1342) suggests micro operation.
fit_notes: Not a fit: micro disability-transport van service, not a school-bus operator. Sub-scale and outside Summit's tuck-in profile. Pass.

name: Abilitrax
principals: Fenton Mobility leadership (Randolph, NY mfg plant)
service_types: product/manufacturer - wheelchair van seating & modular floor systems
districts_or_customers: Sells AbiliTrax floor/seating systems to transit agencies, paratransit fleets, upfitters nationwide; OGS NY contract via Fenton.
recent_news: AbiliTrax launched 2015 as a Fenton Mobility product line; Fenton consolidated manufacturing at the Randolph, NY (old Borden plant) facility in Dec 2018; Fenton acquired Main Mobility (date undisclosed).
fit_notes: DO NOT PURSUE: AbiliTrax is a product line of Fenton Mobility Products (vehicle upfitter/manufacturer), not a student-transport operator. Misclassified in source list. Exclude.

name: Larrys Executive Limousine
districts_or_customers: Sarasota, Bradenton, Lakewood Ranch and surrounding areas; mix of corporate, leisure, school/commuter and special-needs riders. No named district contract identified.
recent_news: No M&A news identified; small owner-operated luxury ground-transport business with stated school/special-needs service line.
fit_notes: Marginal fit: primarily a luxury limo/black-car operator with ancillary school & special-needs service. Likely <10 vehicles, no yellow-bus or district contract; below Summit tuck-in scale. Monitor only.

name: Caring Harts Transportation
districts_or_customers: Wyoming County, NY and surrounding WNY region; Medicaid/NEMT focused; Wyoming County IDA highlighted as local success story.
recent_news: Founded 2006 by Tricia Hart; ~20 years operating; profiled by Wyoming County IDA as success story; D&B est. ~$1.8M revenue, ~16 employees.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus fit: pure NEMT/wheelchair-van operator, no yellow-bus or school district contracts identified. Could be relevant only if Summit pursues adjacent special-needs/SPED-route adjacency in WNY. Otherwise pass.
